decisions.description: Assign a dedicated technical account manager to Orbit Media
Escalate Orbit's support tier to priority at no extra cost

action_items.description: Request a service credit for the two affected months and get director approval
Follow up by Thursday with credit confirmation and the new account manager's name
Take the proposed credit to the exec team to push to stay

key_facts: There were two outages during their reporting window
Support was slow to respond, taking days each time
The outages were tied to a regional issue that has been fixed
